description.zh: Java序列化与反序列化基础概念，通过示例演示反序列化攻击原理。
description.en: Java serialization and deserialization basics, demonstrating deserialization attack principle through examples.

content.zh: 序列化概念：将对象转化为字节流，便于保存在内存、文件或数据库中
content.en: Serialization concept: Convert object to byte stream for storage in memory, file or database

content.zh: 反序列化概念：将字节流转化为对象，恢复对象状态
content.en: Deserialization concept: Convert byte stream to object, restore object state

content.zh: 示例代码：定义People类实现Serializable接口，序列化后写入People.txt，反序列化读取对象
content.en: Example code: Define People class implementing Serializable, serialize to People.txt, deserialize to read object

content.zh: 攻击原理：重写readObject()方法，在反序列化时执行恶意代码如Runtime.getRuntime().exec()
content.en: Attack principle: Override readObject() method, execute malicious code like Runtime.getRuntime().exec() during deserialization
